reasoning: Koren, we're tackling your key limiter of poor lactate clearance today. Your last ride showed a good effort but highlighted the need to improve fatigue resistance and latency to clear lactates. This workout connects with your Alpine Loop target by building strength for continuous climbs like Sundance to Cascade Springs.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5 x 6-min Over-Unders: 3 min at 201-218W, 3 min at 242-256W, 3 min recovery at 50-60% FTP. Repeat.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
